title: Anime Sky1
description: changes your default sky to another one
body:
![sky day](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34e6b2e1f528975f23b8993fdf3c149baa3dedca.jpeg)![sky night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4101ecc0d6ae3730a7471aac917629c6306afd4.jpeg)
This resource pack is an sky overlay which replaces the default minecraft sky with a different sky.You need opifine for sky to work.This texture pack does not work without Optifine.this texture pack replaces the day sky and night sky and that's it. No more features

my links https://linktr.ee/waifusik
